feedback.confusingParts: No. The instructions were all clear.
feedback.suggestions: In the last game, it was difficult to move with the WASD keys and also fire the weapon with Z given the placement of those keys.
feedback.funCriteria: Whether or not I felt frustrated during the game and the ease of the controls mattered a lot. I liked the games that prioritized puzzles and timing the most. I also liked games with humorous aspects, like the blob chasing and devouring humans.
